subcodes.first_line: O cherished handmaiden of God! The sovereignty of earthly monarchs is even as a mirage, fleeting and transient, but thine is an everlasting dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی دولت شاهان عالم چون سراب فانی ناپایدار ولی تو دولت باقی و
subcodes.subjects: @the ephemeral and the eternal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
